title: AscendEX Withdrawal Complaints Mount as ZachXBT Questions Reserves
summary: Multiple AscendEX users have reported delayed withdrawals after crypto investigator ZachXBT raised potential liquidity issues and urged the exchange to explain its reserves.
body:
Several AscendEX users have taken to social media to report delays in withdrawing their funds. This follows a post by crypto investigator ZachXBT, who questioned the exchange's liquidity and urged it to provide transparency about its reserves.

ZachXBT highlighted potential liquidity issues, including delayed withdrawals and a lack of clear communication from the exchange. Font users have reported waiting for hours, and in some cases, days, to access their funds, raising concerns about the platform's financial health.

For everyday crypto users, this situation underscores the importance of choosing exchanges with proven liquidity and transparency. If AscendEX cannot resolve these issues quickly, users may lose trust in the platform, potentially leading to further withdrawals and a liquidity crisis.

Users should monitor official AscendEX channels for updates and consider moving funds to more transparent exchanges if delays persist. Watch for any official statements from AscendEX addressing these concerns and providing proof of reserves.
twitterThread: AscendEX withdrawal complaints mount as ZachXBT flags potential liquidity issues and urges the exchange to explain its reserves.
Multiple users report delays; ZachXBT highlighted potential liquidity issues and lack of communication from AscendEX.

If you're affected, monitor official AscendEX updates and consider moving funds if delays continue. Read more → https://www.cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-06-26-ascendex-users-report-withdrawal-delays-amid-reserve-concerns
standaloneTweet: AscendEX users report delayed withdrawals as ZachXBT questions the exchange's reserves and liquidity. Stay vigilant.
